title: bridelia adusta
intro: Bridelia adusta, also known as the bitter-bush or bitter-wood, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. Traditionally, Bridelia adusta has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bridelia adusta include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as providing protection against cancer and cardiovascular diseases. Bridelia adusta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as a paste made from the leaves and roots, which is applied topically to treat skin conditions.
